corrections.current: οὗ οὐ κατέγνω ἡ ψυχὴ αὐτοῦ,
corrections.correct: οὗ οὐ κατέχει ἡ ψυχὴ αὐτοῦ,

corrections.current: τοῦ βασκαίνοντος ἑαυτὸν οὐκ ἔστιν πονηρότερος,
corrections.correct: τοῦ βασκαίνοντος ἑαυτόν οὐκ ἔστιν πονηρότερος,

Breathing/accent on ἐμπίπλαται appears as printed; included only if strict accent fidelity is required.
Accentuation appears to match; no substantive body error here beyond possible diacritic uncertainty.
Apparatus reads ευρεσεις A, matching plural in lemma.
No question mark visible after A in the image.

uncertain.note: Most body text appears correct; only minor diacritic differences may exist, but image not clear enough to justify more accent-only corrections.
The first siglum before ℵA is difficult; appears as Bab or similar Latin-script siglum, not fully certain.

notes: Running head matches. Body is largely correct except Sir XIV 2 κατέχει misread as κατέγνω. Apparatus has several transcription errors and one corrupted verse transition between 7/8 and 9/10.
